my_thoughts: 'No.'—student presents as unaware. Teacher's move uses comparison_contrast: 'Do you notice tension in your shoulders?'. Strategy: points to somatic sign. Hypothesis: comparison_contrast mechanism will create no_clear_effect. Watching how student responds to this intervention.
accumulated_insight: T1: Student says 'No.' showing unaware via denial. Teacher responds 'Do you notice tension in your shoulders?' using comparison_contrast to points to somatic sign. Opening UNMAKING move addresses unaware. Predicting no_clear_effect because comparison_contrast interventions typically produce this response pattern.
visible_response: Do you notice tension in your shoulders?
